display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: Texas Western's historic win over Adolph Rupp's Kentucky team in the 1966 NCAA final marks a turning point in the SEC. Vanderbilt's Perry Wallace becomes the conference's first Black player, while at LSU, Pete Maravich rewrites the record books.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: Dale Brown brings an infectious personality to LSU while Pat Summitt begins her legendary coaching career at Tennessee. And the year after Adolph Rupp's death in 1977, his successor Joe B. Hall leads Kentucky to its first NCAA title in 20 years.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: Georgia's Dominique Wilkins and Auburn's Charles Barkley headline the SEC's successes in the early 1980s, while LSU's Dale Brown takes two teams to the Final Four. Pat Summitt wins her first two national titles at Tennessee.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: Arkansas joins the SEC and becomes one of the conference's top teams, led by fiery coach Nolan Richardson and his "40 Minutes of Hell" attack. Kentucky returns to prominence, and at Tennessee, Pat Summitt wins three straight NCAA titles.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: In his first year at Kentucky, Tubby Smith becomes the third Black coach ever to win a national title. Florida's back-to-back NCAA crowns mark the rise of a new power. The Lady Vols win 2 straight NCAA titles as LSU reaches 5 straight Final Fours.

programme.title: Southern Hoops: A History of SEC Basketball
programme.desc: John Calipari continues the winning tradition at Kentucky with a national championship in 2012. Four years later, Pat Summitt passes away after battling early-onset Alzheimer's disease. Dawn Staley leads South Carolina to a pair of NCAA titles.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Burger Burger in Biloxi, Miss.; for po-boy loaves, layered with double patties and onion sauce; Troy's Snack Shack in Montezuma, Ga., for sloppy chili-slaw burgers; Hamburger King near downtown Montgomery, Ala.

programme.title: Placeholder
programme.desc: Top college athletes compete for school pride and championship glory.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: A limited series on Southern food and culture. John T. Edge writes and hosts the show and is executive produced by Wright Thompson; Season Five revolves around two food stories told from one place and sets in the conversation to make larger points about Southern beliefs and identities.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: Across generations, people have flocked to this Atlantic Coast city to follow their dreams; farmworkers from south Georgia arrived here in search of jobs as longshoremen; immigrants from Lebanon came in search of religious and economic freedom.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The subject of endless magazine listicles and breathless influencer reels; is it possible to sidestep the algorithms and really see and hear and taste Charleston?

programme.title: Live: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: From Charles Schwab Field Omaha in Omaha, Neb.

programme.title: We're #1! - 1991 & 1992 Duke Blue Devils
programme.desc: Through a mix of archival footage, photographs, game broadcasts and exclusive interviews, We're #1! looks back at the memorable Duke teams that defined an era of college basketball.

programme.title: Why Not Both! The Story of NC State's 2024 Season
programme.desc: This program shines a spotlight on the NC State men's and women's basketball teams, that both reached the 2024 Final Four.

programme.title: We're #1! 1993 North Carolina Tar Heels
programme.desc: Players from the 1993 Men's Basketball North Carolina Tar Heels. Reflect on their great season.

programme.title: E60
programme.desc: An intimate look at the life of Dan Hurley, a basketball coach striving to carve his own path in a family synonymous with hoops.

programme.title: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: Oklahoma faces North Carolina in Game 1 of the Men's College World Series Final. North Carolina seeks its first baseball title after beating West Virginia, 12-7, to qualify. Oklahoma beat Georgia, and is eyeing a third title, its first since 1994.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Examining Bob Knight's fall from grace at Indiana University.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: A recollection of the original Big East Conference, from its simple beginnings and regional rivalries to its national prominence as one of the most successful college basketball leagues, and how it ended up fighting for its survival.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: North Carolina State, coached by Jim Valvano, was a huge underdog in the 1983 NCAA Final vs. top-ranked Houston - resulting in one of the greatest college basketball upsets ever.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Mobster Henry Hill once helped to orchestrate the fixing of Boston College basketball games. Narrated by Ray Liotta, who portrayed Hill in the movie "Goodfellas.".

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Filmmakers Maura Mandt and Josh Swade chronicle the story of the most important document in sports history -- James Naismith's original rules of basketball -- and the quest to return it home.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: Championship Series, Game 2.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Oscar nominee Steve James returns to his hometown of Hampton, Virginia, to take a personal look at a still disputed incident in the life of a young Allen Iverson.

programme.title: Unbelievable: Virginia's Improbable Path to a Title
programme.desc: A look at Virginia's run to its first men's basketball national championship in 2019 after a heart-breaking loss in the first round of the 2018 NCAA Tournament.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Having worn out his welcome in the NBA, Paul Westhead heads to Loyola Marymount University to perfect his run-and-gun offensive system with players Hank Gathers and Bo Kimble.

programme.title: Live: Men's Cycling World Tour
programme.desc: Coverage of stage four of the Tour of Switzerland, a 23.8km individual time-trial around the historic town of Aarburg.

programme.title: Live: Fencing European Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of the second session on day five in Antony, France.

programme.title: Mass Participation World
programme.desc: Action from the Trans Sahara Marathon.

programme.title: TNT Sports Cricket Reload
programme.desc: A look back at Bangladesh v Australia in the second T20 of the series.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Adelaide Crows v Melbourne.

programme.desc: GWS Giants v Carlton.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: Collingwood v Port Adelaide.

programme.desc: Northampton Saints v Exeter Chiefs. Action from the final at Allianz Stadium Twickenham.

programme.title: T100 Triathlon World Tour Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the latest event in San Francisco, California.

programme.title: Mass Participation World
programme.desc: Action from the Trans Sahara Marathon.

programme.title: TNT Sports Reload
programme.desc: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

programme.title: Ultimate Pool
programme.desc: Action from the Group 1 matches in the Champions League tournament, as four players competed in a series of round-robin matches to earn a place in the Super 8's.

programme.title: British Superbikes
programme.desc: Action from race one of the third round of the season, which took place at Knockhill Racing Circuit in Fife, Scotland.

programme.title: TNT Sports Cricket Reload
programme.desc: A look back at Bangladesh v Australia in the third ODI of the series.

programme.title: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: India v Afghanistan. Action from the third ODI in the three-match series, which took place at M. A. Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai.

programme.title: International T20 Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: Bangladesh v Australia. Action from the second T20 in the three-match series, which took place at Bir Shrestho Flight Lieutenant Matiur Rahman Cricket Stadium in Chittagong.

programme.title: Live International T20 Cricket
programme.desc: Bangladesh v Australia. Coverage of the third and final T20 of the series from Bir Shrestha Shahid Flight Lieutenant Motiur Rahman Cricket Stadium in Chattogram. Before this series these two teams had faced each other 11 times in this format, with Australia winning seven of the meetings. The visitors have won the last two fixtures between the sides, including a 28-run victory the last time they fa

programme.desc: A look back at the best action from the second round of the season at Donington Park.

programme.desc: Coverage from the men's and women's lead final, which takes place in Innsbruck, Austria.

programme.title: Live: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: India v Afghanistan. Coverage of the third ODI in the three-match series, which takes place at M. A. Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. The visitors haven't beat India in any of the four completed ODI's between the two sides, with the hosts winning three and the other ending in a thrilling tie in 2018. In that match, Afghanistan made 252-8 with Mohammad Shahzad hitting 124, before they bowled India o

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.desc: From Parkway Bank Sports Complex in Rosemont, Ill.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Rafael Palmeiro and Will Clark, teammates for the 1985 Mississippi State Bulldogs, nearly propelled the team to a College World Series title.

programme.desc: From Great American Ball Park in Cincinnati.

programme.title: Return of the Clowns
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles the extraordinary journey of the Indianapolis Clowns, once icons of Negro League baseball, now reborn for a new generation through the electric world of Banana Ball.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Filmmaker Brett Morgen chronicles events: Arnold Palmer plays his last round at a U.S. Open, the FIFA World Cup kicks off in Chicago, the Rangers celebrate on Broadway, O.J. Simpson leads America on a slow speed chase in a white Ford Bronco.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Countdown
programme.desc: WNBA news, analysis, highlights and interviews.

programme.title: Live: WNBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Los Angeles Sparks host the New York Liberty for a regular-season WNBA basketball game. Los Angeles relies on forward Nneka Ogwumike to anchor the interior offense, while the red-hot Liberty counter with center Jonquel Jones.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Chicago Cubs v Toronto Blue Jays (Start-time 7.20pm). Coverage of the inter-league match at Wrigley Field. These two sides last met in August last year in a three-match series in Toronto. The Blue Jays won the contest 2-1 thanks to 5-1 and 2-1 victories in between a 4-1 for the Cubs.

programme.desc: A look at the most exciting plays from the past week's matches.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Atlanta Braves v Milwaukee Brewers (Start-time 6.35pm). Coverage of the National League match from Truist Park. These two sides last met at this venue in a three-match series last August as the Brewers won all three games thanks to 3-1, 7-2 and 5-4 victories.

programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Jared Sullinger; top five prospects from Southeast; Doron Lamb; Kendall Marshall; national play of the week; Tony Wroten, Jr.; top ten.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sits down with Coach Prime to discuss his recent diagnosis with bladder cancer, how his other health struggles led to that diagnosis and how his faith helps him manage his day-to-day responsibilities.

programme.title: Altitude Extra
programme.desc: Vic Lombardi sat down with Denver Nuggets legend Dan Issel to discuss his basketball career, his involvement with horse racing and his evaluation of Nikola Jokić.

programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: High-stakes tournament poker from some of the world's famous casinos and card rooms.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green

programme.title: MLB Plays of the Week
programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: In the cold of Torrington, Wyo., the crew teams up with High Plains Wingshooters for late-flying geese and all-day pit blind grinds; it's a battle of patience, but the rewards come heavy culminating in fresh pushes of new birds.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Al Lindner details why DT crankbaits shine in northern waters, dialing precise depths to trigger big bass.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Bob Redfern's Outdoor Magazine
programme.desc: Outdoor sporting and recreational events for everyone.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Peter Deeks guides Bill into the tributaries of the Indian River Lagoon in search of tarpon!

programme.title: Livin' the Dream With Captain Jimmy Nelson
programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Crew is having James Bradley down to celebrate his 50th birthday, and somebody lands a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Fly Fisherman Presents the Shoals
programme.desc: Join the Fly Fisherman crew on a wild exploration chasing sharks and giant trevally on foot in the beautiful paradise of St. Brandon Atoll.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures: Fishing with Wesley
programme.desc: Wesley White travels to Brazil to fish for peacock bass on the Rio Negro River.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is in Missouri fishing a gravel pit.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy the Fishmonger is back, and he's taking a road trip up the coast of the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Toshito
programme.desc: A father and son embark on a fishing expedition in Costa Rica, where they navigate the complexities of their relationship while chasing Tosh's dream of catching a marlin on a handline.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Sean Lundy and son, Cole, share the stories of their 2023 and 2024 deer seasons.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Hunting the Gobi ibex and white-tailed gazelle in Mongolia.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. Amidst epic hunts and breathtaking scenery, they address misconceptions about hunting and highlight the collaborative efforts of local communities, governments, and hunters to protect

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy the Fishmonger is back, and he's taking a road trip up the coast of the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: With the arrival of shorter days and cooler temperatures, Heather finishes the year by successfully harvesting a deer before retreating back into her fur shop to sew.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott ventures south to San Diego and teams up with his good buddy, world renowned fishmonger, Tommy Gomes in search of odd creatures from the deep.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Hunting the Gobi ibex and white-tailed gazelle in Mongolia.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve continues his hunt with friends Doug and Mark for Fortymile caribou during the herd's winter migration, culminating in a camp-stove fondue.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve spends time in the kitchen demonstrating how to prepare several of his favorite game dishes that include turkey, trout, dove and venison.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Early season hunting in Alberta is some of the very best spot and stalk hunting and Ben and Melissa fight an absolute monster.

programme.title: This Is Africa
programme.desc: Andy Buchanan and his team embark on adrenaline-fueled hunting adventures across Africa, showcasing the continent's most sought-after trophies while delving into the crucial role of hunters in wildlife conservation. programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: In search of the largest sheep in the world.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A busy 4th of July boat party patrol as well as the opening day of firearm deer season and a look behind the counter at the DNR's front office staff.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: Host Joe Mantegna joins SIG Sauer to discover the replacement for the workhorse M4 carbine; SIG Sauer's M7's aim is to overcome the limitations of the 5.56 and 7.62 NATO rounds.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Some things just have to be experienced to fully understand!

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Open Water Trolling for Salmon and Lake Trout on Lake Superior with 120 MN and WI Veterans supported by the Lake Superior Trollers Association.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: In-Fisherman tactics are finally always a mix of extensive time on the water along with the best science available, so we're tackling big-water smallmouths during a tough mid-summer time on the water.

programme.title: Big Water Angler
programme.desc: Big Water Angler takes viewers on an adventurous journey across the Great Lakes region and beyond, exploring the best fishing destinations, techniques, and insider tips from seasoned captains and guides.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike and Captain Vincent Sabatella catch some big Grouper in the shallow waters of Citrus County.

programme.title: Let's Fish TV
programme.desc: This week's episode features Let's Fish anchor Andrew Upshaw fishing for Shark at Gulf Shores, AL.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: In-Fisherman tactics are finally always a mix of extensive time on the water along with the best science available, so we're tackling big-water smallmouths during a tough mid-summer time on the water.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action-packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straightforward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platf

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland looks for warmer water temperatures near 70 degrees, and casts swim jigs, topwater, and worms for 2-6 pound bass.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Freshwater fishing education and adventure set in the upper Great Lakes and Midwest regions.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Early season hunting in Alberta is some of the very best spot and stalk hunting and Ben and Melissa fight an absolute monster.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Shark hunting. Blood in the water can only mean one thing, the sharks are circling.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott ventures south to San Diego and teams up with his good buddy, world renowned fishmonger, Tommy Gomes in search of odd creatures from the deep.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Christian and Patrick join Capt Don aboard Drift Charters in St Thomas catching Kings, and crushing the bottom fish.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: American Heroes Outdoors
programme.desc: Open Water Trolling for Salmon and Lake Trout on Lake Superior with 120 MN and WI Veterans supported by the Lake Superior Trollers Association.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild exciting adventures.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Co-Host Colin Mulligan joins host and biologist Kelly Warren who wrote the book, on the knowledge and understand of the subspecies of Canada geese that frequent Washington and Oregon.

programme.title: Stompin' groundz
programme.desc: Sean Lundy and son, Cole, share the stories of their 2023 and 2024 deer seasons.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week Blaine Anthony is on his annual Florida trip to get some gators and hogs.

programme.desc: Roger talks about some of his most memorable whitetail hunts from his trophy room.

programme.desc: Tyler Jordan looks at monster buck hunts of Texas.

programme.title: Ultimate Catch
programme.desc: Captain Eric and his guest Ted Norbits fish Headwaters Lake in Central Florida for some exciting winter bass fishing!

programme.title: Texas Team Trail
programme.desc: Lake Texoma shows off for the Texas Team Trail! Find out which anglers rise to the occasion and figure out how to adjust in order to take home this Texas-sized trophy and earn more points towards the Team of the Year presented by Progressive race!

programme.title: Power-Pole National Redfish Tour
programme.desc: The 2025 Power-Pole National Redfish Tour held at Jim King Park in Jacksonville, Fla.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is in Missouri fishing a gravel pit.

programme.title: Fishing With Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland looks for warmer water temperatures near 70 degrees, and casts swim jigs, topwater, and worms for 2-6 pound bass.

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.desc: The fun never ends with Bill & his good friend Roy Harkness & George Young as they fish for blues on the Mississippi down in Vicksburg.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: Peter Deeks guides Bill into the tributaries of the Indian River Lagoon in search of tarpon!

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guyz find some backcountry action along the shoreline of the Cape of Florida with Capt. Brian Gwilliam; George and Lain visit Crane Point Hammock in Marathon; chef Cat prepares an Italian fish recipe submitted by fan Chuckie D.

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Salmon Conservation is the name of the game on Wannock River where the crew works with some of the largest salmon on Earth.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.title: Salt Water Sportsman National Seminar Series
programme.desc: George Poveromo and panel discuss successful wahoo tactics.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.desc: Bringing home the groceries with the Venice, LA big 5. Slot Redfish, Flounder, Speckled Trout, Black Drum, and Sheepshead.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Crew is having James Bradley down to celebrate his 50th birthday, and somebody lands a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob is alone and on a mission. His target? Sight fishing Shallow water sharks on fly.

programme.title: Modern Fishing With Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: Like many anglers, Jared was introduced to fishing as a young boy by his father; Jared wants to return the lifelong favor and get his dad on some Venice Bull Reds in Louisiana, joined by Capt. James Peters.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - Three Teams compete in Shreveport, LA for Knockout Match 2 of the Summit Cup to advance to the Championship.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: The clock ticks away, and the sun sinks below the horizon, but Ott DeFoe knows that one more cast might be all it takes to pull a giant bass from these waters.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: As Fall comes to a close, Bassmaster Classic Champion Ott DeFoe hunts down massive largemouth in this North Carolina lake.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Lake Erie: Epic smallmouth waters.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: James Worldwide Watson takes on Keith Combs on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - Three Teams compete in Shreveport, LA for Knockout Match 2 of the Summit Cup to advance to the Championship.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: The clock ticks away, and the sun sinks below the horizon, but Ott DeFoe knows that one more cast might be all it takes to pull a giant bass from these waters.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: As Fall comes to a close, Bassmaster Classic Champion Ott DeFoe hunts down massive largemouth in this North Carolina lake.

programme.desc: Lake Erie: Epic smallmouth waters.

programme.desc: James Worldwide Watson takes on Keith Combs on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.desc: The clock ticks away, and the sun sinks below the horizon, but Ott DeFoe knows that one more cast might be all it takes to pull a giant bass from these waters.

programme.desc: The clock ticks away, and the sun sinks below the horizon, but Ott DeFoe knows that one more cast might be all it takes to pull a giant bass from these waters.

programme.desc: As Fall comes to a close, Bassmaster Classic Champion Ott DeFoe hunts down massive largemouth in this North Carolina lake.

programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - Three Teams compete in Shreveport, LA for Knockout Match 2 of the Summit Cup to advance to the Championship.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: The clock ticks away, and the sun sinks below the horizon, but Ott DeFoe knows that one more cast might be all it takes to pull a giant bass from these waters.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: As Fall comes to a close, Bassmaster Classic Champion Ott DeFoe hunts down massive largemouth in this North Carolina lake.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Lake Erie: Epic smallmouth waters.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: James Worldwide Watson takes on Keith Combs on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - Three Teams compete in Shreveport, LA for Knockout Match 2 of the Summit Cup to advance to the Championship.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: The clock ticks away, and the sun sinks below the horizon, but Ott DeFoe knows that one more cast might be all it takes to pull a giant bass from these waters.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: As Fall comes to a close, Bassmaster Classic Champion Ott DeFoe hunts down massive largemouth in this North Carolina lake.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Lake Erie: Epic smallmouth waters.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: James Worldwide Watson takes on Keith Combs on Lake of the Ozarks.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa Best of
programme.desc: Mother Nature and the fishing gods team up once a year to create a phenomenon that sends anglers streaming for KZN's famed still waters. Our team takes on the garping Carp on dry flies as these golden slabs cruise the surface at Albert Falls Dam.

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The range and habits of the King of all Kingfish are a mystery to fishermen the world over. Gareth and Jerry head to the Seychelles to take part in a groundbreaking study on the Giant Trevally, while Tommo takes part in a scientific research...

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The Orange River will always draw anglers from far and wide for the giant indigenous yellowfish species it holds.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: Africa's longest and deepest lake in the Great Rift Valley is like an inland sea. The sheer size and depths of this magnificent piece of water are hard to comprehend. Fortunately what lies below is a treasure trove of endemic species.

programme.title: Wildfly Best of
programme.desc: The Orange is South Africa's largest fresh water ecosystem. The powerful largemouth yellowfish and its equally impressive cousin, the smallmouth, are the targets of Wildfly's obsession as they drift down this mighty waterway.
